zh.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne是Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie和Adele Luzarches的兒子，於大約1230年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯。他和Marguerite de Neufbourg至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1274年11月在法國享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meulan,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne was born about 1230, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France as the son of Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie and Adele Luzarches. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Marguerite de Neufbourg. He died in November 1274, in France, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne est né environ 1230, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, fils de Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie et Adele Luzarches. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Marguerite de Neufbourg. Il est décédé en novembre 1274, à France, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne wurde um 1230 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Sohn von Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie und Adele Luzarches geboren. Er hatte mit Marguerite de Neufbourg mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im November 1274 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne è nato il circa 1230 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia come figlio di Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie e Adele Luzarches. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Marguerite de Neufbourg. Morì nel novembre 1274, nel Francia, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marneは約1230年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスでAmaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-BrieとAdele Luzarchesの息子として生まれた。彼はMarguerite de Neufbourgとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1274年11月にフランスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne(은)는 대략 1230년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie(와)과 Adele Luzarches의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Marguerite de Neufbourg(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1274년 11월 프랑스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França filho de Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie e Adele Luzarches. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Marguerite de Neufbourg. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1274, em França, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Amaury III de Meulan, Sgr de la Queue-en-Brie et de Gournay-sur-Marne родился около 1230 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Его родителей звали Amaury II de Meulan, Sgr de Meulan et de la Queue-en-Brie и Adele Luzarches. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Marguerite de Neufbourg. Он умер ноябрь 1274 г. в местности Франция в возрасте 45 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Marguerite de Neufbourg. Murió en noviembre de 1274, en Francia, a la edad de 45 años.
